stepTitle: Which of the following is true?
stepBody:
$$1$$. If you change the decision threshold, it is possible for the area of the ROC curve to increase or decrease.
$$2$$. The bottom left of an ROC curve corresponds to a low decision threshold, while the top right corresponds to a high decision threshold.
$$3$$. If you increase the decision threshold, it is possible for the FPR and TPR to both stay the same.
$$4$$. If you decrease the decision threshold, it is possible for recall to go down.
